name: AI Co-Creator Omni-Engine
description: Procedural level sandbox with harmonic palettes, brush tools, live spawners, reset defaults, FX tools, and an ending designer.

enable-touch-drawing.name: Enable Touch Drawing
enable-touch-drawing.description: Allows the mod to place objects when tapping the editor canvas.

default-bpm.name: Default BPM
default-bpm.description: Default BPM used by the procedural timeline generator.
